data.body: DONE. Epic tsunamic-wax-hog CLOSED (completion-verifier passed with children-closed + aggregate-green evidence). All 12 work-children CLOSED, each landed via Gerrit with LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 (changes 564-575 + follow-up fixes 577,578), all MERGED to main and replicated to GitHub. Parked idea a454 detached to standalone (provenance kept). Discovered follow-ups filed + open: 218b (dead link docs/concurrency.md), 6cca (probe-rebar.sh rot). Aggregate make lint+typecheck+test green (5509 passed, 0 failed) via external venv. Held-out TDD used on the 4 code leaves (f088/0435/e866/235a) - implementer saw happy-path only, full edge/E2E oracle validated by orchestrator. Handoff complete.
